### Product Information

- Remove brake and rail dust from your paint and rims!

- Color changing formula

- Mist, let it dwell, rinse away application

- Product Codes: DIYIR016-CASE, DIYIR0128-CASE

- [Read full description](#product-description)

### Customer Reviews

100% of customers said that they would buy this item again

[Based upon 3 ratings](#product-reviews)

### Product Description

The DIY Detail Iron Remover helps dissolve harmful fallout and brake dust fast and easy! Iron deposits can be a huge problem if they embed into the surface and are left to sit, so it is imperative to remove them safely. When you use an Iron Remover, it will cling to the surface instantly loosening up these iron oxide particles for safe and quick removal. Just spray the surface, let the formula dwell, and rinse away. DIY Detail Iron Remover utilizes a color change technology that will show you that the Iron Remover is reacting to the contamination. Agitate with a wash mitt or sponge if the contamination is heavy and rinse away once you are finished. After use, it will leave your paint or wheels cleaner than before and ready for you to polish or apply a layer of protection. Rust deposits, industrial dust, lime deposits, brake dust, and other contaminants are no match for this strong formula. Even though it is strong, it is still pretty gentle as Iron Remover is pH neutral and safe on various surfaces. Safely and easily remove iron deposits with the DIY Detail Iron Remover!



**Directions:** Spray Iron Remover directly onto a cool surface (wheel or paint) and allow it to dwell for 3-8 minutes. Lightly agitate, if necessary, any ferrous particles will dissolve, forming a purple solution. Do not allow the product to dry on the surface. Rinse the product off the surface.

### Professional Detailer Reviews

The DIY Detail Iron Remover is a popular choice for car enthusiasts looking to remove rust and iron deposits from their vehicles. I delve into what this product offers and why it might be a good fit for you below.

[![image](https://www.detailedimage.com/Ask-a-Pro/wp-content/uploads/2024/04/DIY-Detail-Iron-Remover-Featured-Image-300x147.jpeg)](https://www.detailedimage.com/Ask-a-Pro/diy-detail-iron-remover-user-friendly-iron-remover/)

- [DIY Detail Iron Remover: User-Friendly Iron Remover](https://www.detailedimage.com/Ask-a-Pro/diy-detail-iron-remover-user-friendly-iron-remover/) by [Reece @ DI](https://www.detailedimage.com/Ask-a-Pro/author/reece/)

### From The Label

#### Product Description

Iron Remover is a powerful and effective way to dissolve ferrous oxides from painted surfaces and wheels. Iron remover utilizes color change technology to show you contaminated surfaces.

#### Directions

Spray Iron Remover directly onto a cool surface (wheel or paint) and allow to dwell for 3-8 minutes. Lightly agitate, if necessary, any ferrous particles will dissolve, forming a purple solution. Do not allow the product to dry on the surface. Rinse the product off the surface.



**For Best Results;**

Use in a well-ventilated area out of direct sunlight as the product has a powerful and unpleasant odor.

### Customer Reviews

Reviewed by Raul C. on 4/8/2025

[* DI Verified Purchase](https://www.detailedimage.com/FAQ/Ordering/What-does-DI-Verified-Purchase-mean-on-a-product-review/)

Would they buy this item again? **Yes**

DIY Detail iron remover has been perfect for decontaminating scratchy paint. Paired with the Perforated Synthetic Decon Towel (clay towel) left the once scratchy paint very smooth. Also used for brake dust on the wheels and it left them free of Brake contamination. I only used about 2 oz for a car that has never been decontaminated. Great ROI. The only con was the odor that comes along with most iron removers. However, the odor of this new formulation is not a strong as the original. This is my choice of iron remover moving forward. Very easy to use and very effective.

Reviewed by Brayden O. on 12/11/2024

[** DI Verified Purchase](https://www.detailedimage.com/FAQ/Ordering/What-does-DI-Verified-Purchase-mean-on-a-product-review/)

Would they buy this item again? **Yes**

Very effective and can be used as clay lubricant

Reviewed by Kenneth M. on 10/12/2024

[** DI Verified Purchase](https://www.detailedimage.com/FAQ/Ordering/What-does-DI-Verified-Purchase-mean-on-a-product-review/)

Would they buy this item again? **Yes**

This stuff is fantastic. You know what I love about it..It is not only it's a good iron remover. I use it as I'm claying the vehicle and I use this iron remover as my lubricant.. i've been wanting to do this for years, but none of the iron removers can do something like this, but they engineered this product to do that with lubricants. So if you want to save time and money, this stuff is fantastic. It's off the charts in my books!!
